messages.content: Ok excellent, so now you have all of the general information of what is needed from you to get started, do you have any other additional questions that you would like to ask at all or are you comfortable to get started?

All you would need to get started on the trial Chris would be your amount that you would like to start trading with, the minimum starting amount is Â£300/â¬350/$400, but if you are in a position financially to start with more then you can make a bigger return, but the minimum is still a good amount to start with.  Are you open to starting with that amount?
Hi Charles.  That sounds good to me.  What is the trading platform and how can I get started?

Hey Chris, thanks for the kind words. So the first step would be to set up your trading account (the details to do that will be given to you) once that is done you would then be given the option to deposit your funds and start the trial. 

During the trial you would be using your investment to follow my trades and you would keep all of the profits during those 6 months, this is my way of showing you that you will make a profit using my service before i ask for a small cut. After the trial i would ask for 30 Pounds of every 500 that you make, which i think is a very fair deal. Does that sound fair to you?
Hi there.  Liking your work.  How do I get in on the action?  I have funds ready to invest.  Chris
